title: PAPA — YMCA FIRST
prompt: Medium shot in @kitchen. @Papa on the LEFT stands by the fridge holding a gym bag, smiling kindly but firm. @Mama on the RIGHT clutches the empty coffee bag like a lifeline, eye twitching. Papa (gentle, holding the bag up): "Honey... we promised the YMCA first." Mama (eye twitch worsens): "...how long is the workout." Papa: "Forty-five minutes." Mama (deep breath, jaw tight): "Fine. But we're not stopping for ANYTHING else."
